o better understand where in the ecosystem of existing services the GDP lives. A summary of this survey can be found on the TerraSwarm wiki pages at https://ptolemy.berkeley.edu/accessors/wiki/Main/CloudServiceProviders . This work has motivated the

oudServiceProviders . This work has motivated the continued effort to define and develop the accessor architecture. Accessors are wrappers for sensors, actuators, and services that export an actor interface (see https://ptolemy.berkeley.edu/accessor

terface (see https://ptolemy.berkeley.edu/accessors ). A key strategy is to ensure that accessor hosts can be created on a variety of platforms ranging from deeply embedded machines to cloud-based servers. A paper describing the accessors concept, "A

vers. A paper describing the accessors concept, "A Vision of Swarmlets," has been accepted to the IEEE Networks, Special Issue on Building Internet of Things Software, to appear in March/April 2015 (P070897). Future Work. Lee's team is focused on de

070897). Future Work. Lee's team is focused on defining the static and dynamic interfaces to accessors. The accessors wiki page is main forum for this work (see https://ptolemy.berkeley.edu/accessors/wiki/ ). Edit - History - Print - Recent Changes
